caption: A man wearing a tall, silver-grey wig, glasses, and black headphones sits in a room filled with clothing and framed photos. He is dressed in a white button-down shirt with a red bow tie and gold suspenders. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone. On the left side of the screen, a logo reads "THE STALBIO PODCAST," and on the right, text says "GOSS TALK JOY" followed by "let's talk about it." In the first few frames, the man is seen raising his right arm and hand upward. As the sequence progresses, he lowers his arm, and by the final frame, his hand is no longer raised, and he remains focused forward. The background features various articles of clothing, including shirts with the brand "LEE" visible, and several framed pictures hanging on the wall.
